feedback.text: Greetings, I would like to show my support to a movement by writing this letter. This movement stands by the consumers right to own the product they buy and be able to have said product not be destroyed by the corporate hands. We who spend our hard and fair earned money on games which, brings many of us joy and an escape of a harsh world, should ALWAYS maintain the right to be able to play those games. I hope this will be received and taken into account. Thanks you!
